On this page
Table of Contents for current page

API Basics #

Simplified Overview of our API and how to use it.

Endpoints #

FREE : free.nocaptchaai.com

PRO/Paid : pro.nocaptchaai.com

Browser Automation Studio (BAS) Endpoints #

free : pro.nocaptchaai.com/in.php

PRO/Paid : free.nocaptchaai.com/in.php

Software SDK #

We and community members have created SDKs for various programming languages.

JavaScript #

Chrome Extension:

  • https://github.com/noCaptchaAi/chrome-extension

hCaptcha Tampermonkey:

  • https://github.com/noCaptchaAi/hCaptchaSolver.user.js

ProBot Tampermonkey:

  • https://greasyfork.org/en/scripts/461121-probot-ocr-solver-nocaptchaai

puppeteer.ts:

  • https://github.com/the-captcha-ai/captcha-solver/raw/main/usage_examples/puppeteer.ts

puppeteer.js:

  • https://github.com/the-captcha-ai/captcha-solver/raw/main/usage_examples/puppeteer.js

playwright.js:

  • https://github.com/the-captcha-ai/captcha-solver/raw/main/usage_examples/playwright.js

nodeJS #

puppeteer:

  • https://github.com/noCaptchaAi/nocaptchaai-puppeteer

Selenium:

  • https://github.com/Hammad69275/NoCaptchaSolver

Another puppeteer:

  • https://github.com/ghegad/nocaptchaai

  • https://www.npmjs.com/package/nocaptchaai?activeTab=explore

Python #

Python requests:

  • https://github.com/the-captcha-ai/captcha-solver/raw/main/usage_examples/python_requests.py

selenium:

  • https://github.com/the-captcha-ai/captcha-solver/raw/main/usage_examples/example-selenium.py

Python requests + Playwright :

  • https://github.com/the-captcha-ai/captcha-solver/raw/main/usage_examples/python_requests_with_Playwright.py

Python requests + url:

  • https://github.com/the-captcha-ai/captcha-solver/raw/main/usage_examples/python_requests_url.py

GO #

chromecdp:

  • https://github.com/the-captcha-ai/captcha-solver/raw/main/usage_examples/chromecdp.go

  • https://github.com/the-captcha-ai/captcha-solver/raw/main/usage_examples/golang.go
